keypoints: 问候语：Hello! / Hi! / Good morning! / Good afternoon! / Good evening!
自我介绍：I'm... / My name is...
询问姓名：What's your name?
be动词：I am = I'm, you are = you're

quiz.q: How do you answer 'Good morning!'?
quiz.explanation: 'Good morning!' 的礼貌回答是同样的 'Good morning!'。

quiz.q: A: What's ___ name? B: My name is Tom.
quiz.explanation: 询问对方姓名用 your（你的）。

pdf_file: (根据2022年版课程标准修订)义务教育教科书_英语_七年级_上册.pdf

section: What's this in English? —— 物品识别
keypoints: 询问物品：What's this/that in English?
回答：It's a/an...
不定冠词：a用于辅音音素前，an用于元音音素前
指示代词：this（近指）/ that（远指）

quiz.q: ___ apple is on the desk.
___ is a book. (近处)
quiz.explanation: this指近处单数物品，that指远处。

pdf_file: (根据2022年版课程标准修订)义务教育教科书_英语_七年级_上册.pdf

section: What color is it? —— 颜色
keypoints: 颜色词汇：red, yellow, green, blue, black, white, purple, brown, orange, pink
询问颜色：What color is it?
回答：It's + 颜色
描述物品：The pen is blue.

quiz.q: What color is the sky? It's ___.
The banana is ___ (黄色的).

pdf_file: (根据2022年版课程标准修订)义务教育教科书_英语_七年级_上册.pdf

section: You and Me —— 个人信息
keypoints: 询问姓名：What's your/his/her name?
询问年龄：How old are you? I'm 12 years old.
询问来自哪里：Where are you from? I'm from China.
人称代词：I/you/he/she/it/we/they

quiz.q: ___ is from Beijing. ___ name is Li Ming.
quiz.explanation: Li Ming是男性名，用He（他）和His（他的）。

quiz.q: A: ___ are you from? B: I'm from Shanghai.

pdf_file: (根据2022年版课程标准修订)义务教育教科书_英语_七年级_上册.pdf

keypoints: 家庭成员词汇：father, mother, brother, sister, grandfather, grandmother, parents
名词所有格：Tom's father, my mother's book
介绍家人：This is my father. / These are my parents.
名词复数：parent→parents, brother→brothers

quiz.q: This is ___ book. (Tom的书)
My father and mother are my ___.

pdf_file: (根据2022年版课程标准修订)义务教育教科书_英语_七年级_上册.pdf

keypoints: 学校设施词汇：classroom, library, playground, dining hall, lab, gym
There be句型：There is/are...
方位介词：in, on, under, behind, next to, between
一般疑问句：Is there a library? Yes, there is.

quiz.q: ___ a library in our school.
The library is ___ the classroom and the lab.
quiz.explanation: between A and B 表示在两者之间。

pdf_file: (根据2022年版课程标准修订)义务教育教科书_英语_七年级_上册.pdf

section: My Favorite Subject —— 学科喜好
keypoints: 学科词汇：Chinese, math, English, history, geography, biology, PE, music, art
询问喜好：What's your favorite subject?
表达原因：Why do you like...? Because it's...
形容词：interesting, fun, easy, difficult, boring, useful

quiz.q: — ___ is your favorite subject? — Math.
quiz.explanation: 询问最喜欢什么学科用What。

quiz.q: — Why do you like English? — ___ it's interesting.

pdf_file: (根据2022年版课程标准修订)义务教育教科书_英语_七年级_上册.pdf

keypoints: 情态动词can：表示能力（能/会）
can的否定：cannot = can't
一般疑问句：Can you swim? Yes, I can. / No, I can't.
社团词汇：chess club, music club, sports club, art club

quiz.q: — ___ you play the piano? — Yes, I can.
I can swim but I ___ (不会) play chess.

pdf_file: (根据2022年版课程标准修订)义务教育教科书_英语_七年级_上册.pdf

section: A Day in the Life —— 日常生活
keypoints: 时间表达：What time...? / When...?
频度副词：always, usually, often, sometimes, never
一般现在时：I get up at 7:00. / He gets up at 7:00.
第三人称单数动词变化：get→gets, go→goes, have→has

quiz.q: She ___ to school at 7:30 every day.
quiz.explanation: She是第三人称单数，动词go要加-es变成goes。

quiz.q: I ___ eat breakfast at home. (频率100%)

pdf_file: (根据2022年版课程标准修订)义务教育教科书_英语_七年级_上册.pdf

keypoints: 月份词汇：January-December
序数词：first, second, third, fourth...
日期表达：My birthday is on May 5th.
询问日期：When is your birthday?

quiz.q: January is the ___ month of the year.
quiz.explanation: 一月是一年的第一个月，用序数词first。

quiz.q: My birthday is ___ May 1st.
quiz.explanation: 具体某一天前面用介词on。

pdf_file: (根据2022年版课程标准修订)义务教育教科书_英语_七年级_上册.pdf
